item.title: Kαfεmιηαrιo ☕ (Segundo semestre 2023)
item.description: Únetenos a nuestra excitante caféaventura involucrando tópicos en diversas áreas de la matemática.

item.title: About Me 🧑
item.description: Born on March 3rd, 1998 in Buenos Aires (Argentina). 🎂 CVC 📂 March 2023 - now: PhD student in mathematics, in the university Pontificia Universidad Católica de Valparaíso (Chile). March 2017 - October 2022: Undergraduate studies in the University of Buenos Aires (Argentina). Theses in mathematics 📝 October 11th, 2022. Undergraduate thesis: Introduction to the local Langlands correspondance for GL2. Directed by Nicolás Sirolli. Seminars 🧑‍🎓 Second semester 2023. Students seminar: Graduate seminar organized by students (I was one of the organizers).

item.title: Notes 📚
item.description: Here is a list of my personal notes in several topics and courses. They are freely available. Note 1

item.title: Research 🔬
item.description: About my research: ——— (Pre)publications Scholarship At the moment I have a scholarship: Beca de Manutención para alumnos extranjeros de programas de doctorado de la Pontificia Universidad Católica de Valparaíso 2023. Current grants Previous grants

item.title: Teaching 🧑‍🏫
item.description: Universidad de Buenos Aires, Facultad de Ciencias Exactas y Naturales, Departamento de Matemática (📍 Buenos Aires, Argentina) Ayudante de Primera con dedicación parcial (Teaching assistant with more duties) My duties involved correcting exams, answering questions about exercises and preparing half of the problem-solving classes. Second semester 2022: Álgebra I. Sets, arithmetic of integers. Complex numbers and polynomials in K[X]. Ayudante de Segunda (Teaching assistant) My duties involved correcting exams, answering questions about exercises and preparing only two or three problem-solving classes.
